title: lonicera alpigena subsp. glehnii
intro: Lonicera alpigena subsp. glehnii, also known as Glehn's honeysuckle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lonicera alpigena subsp. glehnii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. It is typically prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
